note: Codified from City of Pflugerville Unified Development Code §4.2.4, Tables 4.2.4A–C, at https://online.encodeplus.com/regs/pflugerville/doc-view.aspx?print=1&tocid=004.004, accessed 2026-07-21. SHIPPED rows map directly to live GIS ZOINING_TY codes SF-S, SF-R, and MF-20. The GIS values GB1, GB2, LI, and O are explicitly omitted: their non-residential dimensional standards have not been separately resolved from conditional and adjacency-specific values, so envelopes remain honest gaps. max_lot_coverage_pct and max_impervious_pct are not supplied as a single unqualified value for these selected variants; 100 is the established non-binding sentinel and is marked not_specified.

front_ft.quote: Table 4.2.4A, SF-S: Minimum Front Street Setback 25'.

side_ft.quote: Table 4.2.4A, SF-S: Minimum Interior Side Setback 7.5'.

side_corner_ft.quote: Table 4.2.4A, SF-S: Minimum Side Street Setback (corner lots) 15'.

max_height_ft.quote: Table 4.2.4C: A, SF-E, SF-S, SF-R, SF-MU, 2-F maximum principal building height 35'.

max_lot_coverage_pct.quote: Selected SF-S row has no single unqualified maximum lot-coverage value in Tables 4.2.4A–C.

max_impervious_pct.quote: Selected SF-S row has no single unqualified maximum impervious-cover value in Tables 4.2.4A–C.
